data.name: DANGO!
data.detailed_description:
PROJECT: STELLAR GIRLS


NEW GAME - PROJECT: SWORD ART


Naive Riri


SWEET FANTASY! NEW GAME!


NEW GAME!


NEW GAME!


NEW GAME!


關於此遊戲

BEAUTIFUL 100 ACHIEVEMENTS!



DANGO! - is a casual liquid puzzle game. You need to pass a variety of levels, draw a path through which the liquid will flow and fill the vessel. DANGO! - is a fascinating arcade game with beautiful music, lots of levels and colorful anime-style illustrations. In the game DANGO you expect 60 extraordinarily beautiful, complex and interesting levels, on the passage of which you will open full access to the Gallery.

What can be found in this game:


  • Challenging and interesting puzzles

  • Beautiful anime illustrations

  • Incredible sound and visual effects

  • 100 colorful achievements

  • Gallery with anime illustrations that you will unlock as you progress through the levels



DANGO! has fun and interesting gameplay, challenging levels, pleasant music and beautiful anime illustrations.
You'll have a good time in this game as you unlock the illustrations in the gallery as you progress through the levels!

data.short_description: DANGO! - is a casual liquid puzzle game. You need to pass a variety of levels, draw a path through which the liquid will flow and fill the vessel.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 泰文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WINDOWS® 7 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3 Serise or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
  • 備註: This requirements are not final
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WINDOWS® 7 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5 Serise or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
  • 備註: This requirements are not final

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: WINDOWS® 7 / 8.1 / 10
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i3 Serise or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
  • Additional Notes: This requirements are not final
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: WINDOWS® 7 / 8.1 / 10
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i5 Serise or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
  • Additional Notes: This requirements are not final
